ip_outcome_note: Visual match confirmed: small green creature encased in translucent jelly-like membrane matches National Pokedex no. 577 exactly. PokemonTCG.io API xy10-33 confirms name, types, and artist.

trivia_bullets.text: Solosis appears as a Psychic-type common in Fates Collide (XY10, May 2016), a set built around psychic and dimensional themes headlined by Alakazam-EX and Zygarde. Solosis is a Generation V (Unova) Pokemon appearing in a Generation VI (XY) set.

Solosis (National Pokedex no. 577) is explicitly designed after a biological cell: body = nucleus, surrounding green fluid = cytoplasm, curly yellow growth = endoplasmic reticulum. The psychic fluid allows it to survive in any environment including the vacuum of space; when struck hard the fluid can leak away.
The Solosis->Duosion->Reuniclus line traces cell division: single cell, two nuclei (dividing cell), morula-cluster embryo. One of the franchise's most explicitly biology-grounded design families.
sources: WebSearch: professorrimu.wordpress.com Science of Multiplying Pokemon

trivia_bullets.text: "They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others."
Art credited to match, a Pokemon TCG illustrator active across XY-era commons.

related_cards.note: Mid-stage evolution; two-nuclei dividing cell design

related_cards.name: Reuniclus
related_cards.note: Final evolution; morula-cluster embryo; the cell colony endpoint
